title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_worktree_remove
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_worktree_remove' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

path.description: Path of the worktree to remove. Must not be the main worktree. Sibling paths outside the repo toplevel are allowed; leading `-` and NUL are rejected.

force.description: Allow removal of worktrees with uncommitted changes (`--force`).
